It's our pleasure to invite our valued Three Rivers guests to our **Easter Basket Reveal**!

All invited players will receive **$75 in Free Play** valid April 3rd and 4th.

main.body_md:
# Your Easter Basket is reserved! 

Thank you for your RSVP. If you need to make any changes just scan your invitation again. We look forward to seeing you at **Three Rivers Casino Resort**!

*Remember: $75 in Free Play is valid April 3rd and 4th.*
